title: Items left in draft - tracking and or automation needed
excerpt: Please build a feature that keeps track of items/updates left in edit or draft mode. Sometimes updates are left in draft mode for days and there is no indication on the board this is the case! So, notes and updates are o…

posts.author: savaslabsadmin (Alison)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please build a feature that keeps track of items/updates left in edit or draft mode. Sometimes updates are left in draft mode for days and there is no indication on the board this is the case! So, notes and updates are often left in the abyss

If there isn’t an automation that can be built, please allow the tracking of edits so users can build their own.

Thanks!
